name: local-saml-idp
description: Local SAML 2.0 IdP emulator for development testing

scripts.compile: mkdir -p binaries && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 ./server.ts --outfile ./binaries/local-saml-linux-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 ./server.ts --outfile ./binaries/local-saml-linux-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 ./server.ts --outfile ./binaries/local-saml-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 ./server.ts --outfile ./binaries/local-saml-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 ./server.ts --outfile ./binaries/local-saml-windows-x64.exe
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun run compile
